'''yochangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabbaged|cabbaged]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ch-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabbaged|cabbaged]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yochangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yochangithi|yochangithi]] || [[word:yochangiji|yochangiji]] || [[word:yochangishi|yochangishi]] || [[word:yochangiki|yochangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yochanguthuthu|yochanguthuthu]] || [[word:yochangujuju|yochangujuju]] || [[word:yochangushushu|yochangushushu]] || [[word:yochangukuku|yochangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yochanguthu|yochanguthu]] || [[word:yochanguju|yochanguju]] || [[word:yochangushu|yochangushu]] || [[word:yochanguku|yochanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yochangufthuf|yochangufthuf]] || [[word:yochangufjuf|yochangufjuf]] || [[word:yochangufshuf|yochangufshuf]] || [[word:yochangufkuf|yochangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yochangethe|yochangethe]] || [[word:yochangeje|yochangeje]] || [[word:yochangeshe|yochangeshe]] || [[word:yochangeke|yochangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yochangothotho|yochangothotho]] || [[word:yochangojojo|yochangojojo]] || [[word:yochangoshosho|yochangoshosho]] || [[word:yochangokoko|yochangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yochangotho|yochangotho]] || [[word:yochangojo|yochangojo]] || [[word:yochangosho|yochangosho]] || [[word:yochangoko|yochangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yochangofthof|yochangofthof]] || [[word:yochangofjof|yochangofjof]] || [[word:yochangofshof|yochangofshof]] || [[word:yochangofkof|yochangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yochangĂŻfthĂŻf|yochangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yochangĂŻfjĂŻf|yochangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yochangĂŻfshĂŻf|yochangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yochangĂŻfkĂŻf|yochangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yochangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|yochangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yochangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|yochangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yochangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|yochangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yochangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|yochangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yochangĂŻfthĂŻf|yochangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yochangĂŻfjĂŻf|yochangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yochangĂŻfshĂŻf|yochangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yochangĂŻfkĂŻf|yochangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yochangĂŻfthĂŻf|yochangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yochangĂŻfjĂŻf|yochangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yochangĂŻfshĂŻf|yochangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yochangĂŻfkĂŻf|yochangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yochangĂŠthĂŠ|yochangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:yochangĂŠjĂŠ|yochangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:yochangĂŠshĂŠ|yochangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:yochangĂŠkĂŠ|yochangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yochangathatha|yochangathatha]] || [[word:yochangajaja|yochangajaja]] || [[word:yochangashasha|yochangashasha]] || [[word:yochangakaka|yochangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yochangatha|yochangatha]] || [[word:yochangaja|yochangaja]] || [[word:yochangasha|yochangasha]] || [[word:yochangaka|yochangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yochangafthaf|yochangafthaf]] || [[word:yochangafjaf|yochangafjaf]] || [[word:yochangafshaf|yochangafshaf]] || [[word:yochangafkaf|yochangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yochangasha|yochangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yochangshĂ«sha|yochangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yochangrosha|yochangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yochangmusha|yochangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yochangyasha|yochangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyochangnkshĂ«sha|goyochangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyochangnkrosha|goyochangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyochangnkmusha|goyochangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyochangnkyasha|goyochangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yochachangasha|yochachangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yochachangshĂ«sha|yochachangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yochachangrosha|yochachangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yochachangmusha|yochachangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yochachangyasha|yochachangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyochachangnkshĂ«sha|goyochachangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyochachangnkrosha|goyochachangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyochachangnkmusha|goyochachangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyochachangnkyasha|goyochachangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yechĂŠngasha|yechĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yechĂŠngshĂ«sha|yechĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yechĂŠngrosha|yechĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yechĂŠngmusha|yechĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yechĂŠngyasha|yechĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyechĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|goyechĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyechĂŠngnkrosha|goyechĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyechĂŠngnkmusha|goyechĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyechĂŠngnkyasha|goyechĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yochfangasha|yochfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yochfangshĂ«sha|yochfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yochfangrosha|yochfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yochfangmusha|yochfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yochfangyasha|yochfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyochfangnkshĂ«sha|goyochfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyochfangnkrosha|goyochfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyochfangnkmusha|goyochfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyochfangnkyasha|goyochfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
